sqlMap.insert: insert into delta_log(project_id, xml_template, node_name, keys, attributes, actioncode) values(#project_id#, #xml_template#, #node_name#, #keys#, #attributes#, #actioncode#) SELECT @@IDENTITY as last_insert_id
sqlMap.select: select * from delta_log where project_id = #project_id# and xml_template = #xml_template# order by logtime asc
